name: RouteNinja
description: Find call-graph paths between two functions and visualize call trees.
longdescription: RouteNinja enumerates shortest paths through the Binary Ninja call graph from a chosen source function to a chosen target function. Useful when you know a deep function was reached (e.g. an error path, a crash site, or a sensitive sink) and want to see which branches from your entry point lead there. Bidirectional BFS keeps the search fast on large binaries; results are shown as an interactive flow graph with clickable nodes that jump to the underlying function. Also includes a call-tree view — pick one function and see everything it reaches (callees) or everything that reaches it (callers), laid out breadth-first up to a configurable depth.

license.name: GPL-3.0-only
license.text: RouteNinja is licensed under the GNU General Public License v3.0. See the LICENSE file in the repository root for the full license text.

installinstructions.Darwin: Install via Binary Ninja's Plugin Manager, or clone this repository into ~/Library/Application Support/Binary Ninja/plugins/RouteNinja.
installinstructions.Linux: Install via Binary Ninja's Plugin Manager, or clone this repository into ~/.binaryninja/plugins/RouteNinja.
installinstructions.Windows: Install via Binary Ninja's Plugin Manager, or clone this repository into %APPDATA%\Binary Ninja\plugins\RouteNinja.

author: 0Dr3f
